title: hexo基本命令
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server$ hexo server
The blog will be deployed at localhost and will be updated dynamically while coding.
More info: Server
Generate static files$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
Clean cache$ hexo clean
Don’t forget to clean cache…

title: Kaggle Courses-1-编程介绍
content:
Get started with Python, if you have no coding experience. Click here for more information.


Arithmetic and Variables
Make calculations, and define and modify variables.

Printing打印一条消息。
print('hello')
Arithmetic打印计算结果。
print(1 + 2)
Comment使用 # 写注释。
Functions
Organize your code and avoid redundancy.

Simple exampledef add_three(input_var):    output_var = input_var + 3    return output_var
函数包含两个部分: header 和 body.

Header: 定义函数名和参数。
Body: 定义函数如何工作。

Variable “scope”函数内部定义的变量无法在函数外访问。
Data Types
Explore integers, floats, booleans, and strings.

int, float, boolean, string
Conditions and Conditional Statements
Modify how functions run, depending on the input.if, if-else, if-elif-else

Intro to Lists
Organize your data so you can work with it efficiently.

Indexing
获取最后一个元素: [-1]
获取倒数第二个元素: [-2]

Slicing切片：获取列表的一个片段。

获取前 x 个元素：[:x]
获取后 y 个元素：[-y:]此处“元素”的英文为“entry”。l = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]print(l[:2])print(l[-2:])
[1, 2][4, 5]

Removing使用 .remove()
Adding使用 .add()
